comments.LineComment: | ColorEditor — Bounded color editing for context menus.
| A stateless color editor that receives color from parent and emits changes.
| Uses Schema atoms for bounded values:
| - Compact: Single color swatch with popover
| - Expanded: Full color space tabs (HSL, RGB, HWB, OKLAB, OKLCH)
| All values are Schema atoms. No unbounded Number or Int. No escape hatches.
